headline: 6 Retail Stocks To Watch During Amazon Prime Day: Report Shows Potential Winners
summary: Amazon Prime Days run June 23 through June 26. A report says physical retailers look strong and could offer their own sales during the event.

headline: Lowe's is Calling on Creators to Help Design and Launch New Products
summary: As Lowe's Creator Network hits its one-year milestone, today the company announced the next evolution of growing with creators. Now, creators in the network, and even those new to joining, will have an opportunity to evolve from content creation to product creation. Through the new program, Lowe's Creator: Into the Blue, creators can pitch innovative product ideas to Lowe's for potential future retail distribution, with the full support of Lowe's product design and development teams to help brin

headline: Is Lowe's (LOW) Entertainment-Focused Loyalty Push a New Edge in Customer Engagement?
summary: Lowe's Companies, Inc. recently announced a multi-year partnership with Live Nation Entertainment to offer MyLowe's Rewards and MyLowe's Pro Rewards members exclusive live music benefits, including concert perks and amphitheater tailgate experiences at select venues starting this summer. This expansion of the loyalty program into entertainment experiences highlights Lowe's effort to deepen customer engagement beyond the store and into members' leisure time. Next, we’ll explore how this...
